principles.name: Adopt a Holistic View
principles.definition: Understand and manage projects by considering all components and their interdependencies as part of a larger system.

principles.name: Embed Quality Into Processes and Deliverables
principles.name_ja: プロセスと成果物への品質の組み込み
principles.definition: Translate requirements into executable activities to meet stakeholder expectations, utilizing continuous improvement.

principles.name: Be an Accountable Leader
principles.name_ja: 説明責任あるリーダーシップ
principles.definition: Take ownership of objectives, decisions, and actions; fostering trust, psychological safety, and shared leadership.

principles.name: Build an Empowered Culture
principles.name_ja: エンパワーメントされた文化の構築
principles.definition: Promote mutual trust, clear roles, team agreements, and a collaborative environment that leverages diversity.

principles.name: Focus on Value
principles.definition: Continually adjust project alignment to strategic objectives, prioritizing outcomes over outputs.

principles.name: Integrate Sustainability Within All Project Areas
principles.name_ja: 全領域における持続可能性の統合
principles.definition: Meet present needs without compromising future generations by balancing the triple bottom line: people, profit, and planet.

governance_domain.description: The framework, functions, and processes that guide project management decisions to optimize value delivery.
